title: Dataset for "Reduction-responsive immobilised and protected enzymes" research article
author: Wu, Congyu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset for the paper titled "Reduction-responsive immobilised and protected enzymes". The dataset includes the following items:  1. Unprocessed tif files (4 items) of the scanning electron microscopy (SEM) micrographs; These SEM micrographs are presented in Fig. 3a and Fig. 3b in the manuscript and also in Fig. S1a and Fig. S1b in the supporting information document.  2. "Reduction-responsive immobilised and protected enzymes" xls file (1 file) including 4 datasheets; - The " Cell experiment"  sheet includes the cell viability results in Fig. 5d and Fig. S5. - The " Enzyme activity - B-Gal"  sheet includes all the results regarding the B-Gal enzyme activity in Fig. 4, main text, and Fig. S3. - The " Enzyme activity - ASNase"  sheet includes all the results regarding the ASNase enzyme activity in Fig. 5b, Fig. 5c, and Fig. S4. - The  "B-Gal and ASNase layer growth"  sheet includes all the results regarding the layer growth reactions and kinetics of B-Gal and ASNase enzymes in Fig. 3d, Fig. 5a, and Fig. S1d.  3. "SNP and layer growth analysis" xls file (1 file) including 13 datasheets; These datasheets contain the raw data of the size measurements of the silica nanoparticles conducted on the SEM micrographs before and after layer growth for each sampling timepoint for both B-Gal and ASNase enzymes with glutaraldehyde (Glu) and DSP as linkers. Note: These data were used to make the graphs in the " B-Gal and ASNase layer growth"  sheet.
